name: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. 5.50% Series B Cumulative Convertible Preferred Stock par value $0.01 per share
summary: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. 5.50% Series B Cumulative Convertible Preferred Stock par value $0.01 per share represents a class of preferred stock issued by Braemar Hotels & Resorts, a REIT. It pays a fixed dividend of 5.50% and can be converted into shares of common stock under certain conditions. The company invests in luxury hotels and resorts.
